steps.title: Locate the shared claim about shade
steps.content: The key signal is that both texts explicitly state organ pipe cacti provide shade that protects tepary beans from intense heat and light.

steps.title: Confirm the agreement
steps.content: Choice A captures both authors' position: organ pipe cacti provide shade that protects tepary beans from heat and light. Text 1 explains this clearly when describing how the planting arrangement “helps protect tepary beans from the harshest heat and light,” and Text 2 emphasizes how O'odham farmers plant tepary beans “in the shade of...organ pipe cacti for protection from the sun and heat.” The other choices either make unsupported comparisons, contradict Text 2's description of shade requirements, or reference details from only one text. That matches choice A — A is correct.
